pattern: execute positioned without coordinates in death commands
lesson: When users report 'CommandSyntaxException Expected double at position 19: ...ositioned <--[HERE]', the issue is that 'execute positioned' requires explicit XYZ coordinates. In Boss death commands, use {boss_x} {boss_y} {boss_z} which resolve from the boss entity's location and work even without a player killer. Do NOT suggest relative coords (~ ~ ~) for death commands since they run as console when no player is involved. The correct pattern is: execute positioned {boss_x} {boss_y} {boss_z} run <command>
